title: Scaloni's reasons: Why Tagliafico stays in the World Cup squad injured | OneFootball
original_text:
The fears of the Argentina national team coaching staff were confirmed this Thursday. Medical tests confirmed that Nicolás Tagliafico suffered a soleus muscle injury that will keep him out of the opener.

Even though the strain comes less than a week before the debut, Lionel Scaloni made a firm decision after meeting with the defender: to keep him on the final list of 26 called-up players.

Within the national team setup, they understand that his presence will be vital in the decisive stages. That is why the coaching staff preferred to risk missing him during the first part of the tournament rather than do without his experience.

This article was translated into English by Artificial Intelligence. You can read the original version in 🇪🇸 here.
